title: feat: website redesign — flywheel, tier cards, copy
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Spinning the Flywheel
gist.blurb: The hive has a new look! We've redesigned the website around our new flywheel: build, ship, grow, earn.
gist.summary: A comprehensive website redesign introduces a new 'flywheel' narrative, simplified contributor tiers, and a refreshed 'cozy' UI theme.
gist.impact: Users will experience a completely new landing page, clearer progression paths for earning pollen, and a more unified visual interface.
gist.visual_concept: The 'Flywheel' narrative (Build -> Ship -> Grow -> Earn) represented as a literal garden mechanism. The bee is the operator of this cycle.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot turning a large, mossy wooden flywheel in a lush garden. The wheel glows with lime green (#ecf874) energy, watering nearby code-plants. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'FLYWHEEL'. Nostalgic but beautiful.
